series_metadata.series_description: May include constitution, articles of agreement or certification, bylaws, rules, regulations, list of members/subscribers, name/address to send notices/orders, agreement/statement of qualifications, any amendments and licenses issued by the Department of Insurance. Required pursuant to ORC 3935.06, 3935.10, 3935.12, 3937.05,3937.09, and 3937.12.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after inactive, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after inactive, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
